name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: catalog number assignment per stamp and catalog system.

entities.name: stamp_catalog_number
entities.brief: One catalog listing reference for a stamp.
entities.description: Stores Scott, Michel, Facit, etc. numbers per stamp; a stamp may have multiple rows for different systems or supplements.

fields.name: catalog_line_id
fields.description: Surrogate primary key for this catalog line.

fields.name: catalog_system_abbreviation
fields.description: Which catalog system the number belongs to (matches catalog_system primary key).

fields.name: catalog_number
fields.description: Number as printed in the catalog (e.g. 85a, 123 II, 4y).

fields.name: supplement_notes
fields.description: Specialized catalog notes, plate blocks, or variety suffixes.
